chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3555 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 20109/16 23.10.2017. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel alongwith Babar Hussain, Secretary U.C Shah Mardan Shah, and Muhammad Aslam Qureshi, Assistant Director, Local Fund Audit, District Umerkot. The petitioner is the widow of Muhammad Ishaque, who was posted as Chowkidar in U.C Shah Mardan Shah and died during service on 23.02.2014 leaving behind four legal heirs including the petitioner. The petitioner has filed this petition seeking directions to the respondents to release pension, gratuity, financial assistance, leave encashment, benevolent fund, group insurance and other death claim benefits of her husband to her. In compliance of order dated 13.10.2017, Secretary U.C Shah Mardan Shah namely Babar Hussain has appeared and has undertaken that he would give Rs.30,000/- per month towards the outstanding amount of family pension in addition to monthly pension to the petitioner, to which she is entitled. He has also undertaken that by 5th of every month he will deposit the requisite cheque in Sindh Bank where the petitioner has opened her account for said purpose. The petitioner’s Counsel has shown his satisfaction and seeks disposal of this petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition in above terms is allowed. Listed application also stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
